landing.bio: I am a Computer Science Engineer interested in working in Machine Learning and Web development.  My tech stack in Machine learning are Python and R, also I had worked with different classifiers and algorithms for information processing. In web development for the frontend, I work with HTML, CSS and Javascript. For the backend, I work with PHP and ajax.

experience.aboutWork: Solving Hardware and Software problems in the department
develop web pages for small businesses

interests.paragraphOne: Right now I am in the ninth semester and in my free time, I do exercise like go running or weight training also I enjoy watching old movies, series of any kind, and soccer games.
interests.paragraphTwo: Some of my new hobbies are go skating and learn Japanese.
